title: Vortik Open Schema — Commitment Layer Semantic Anchor
description: Minimal metadata schema for L1 commitment / preconfirmation coordination terminology. Research artefact; not an official specification.

protocol.description: Semantic anchor label used by Vortik for the commitment + preconfirmation coordination surface (non-normative).

identifier.description: ENS identifier mapped to this semantic anchor.

primitive_scope.description: Human-readable scope definition: what this anchor covers and what it explicitly does not cover.

canonical_terms.description: Terms observed in primary sources and community usage for this concept surface (e.g., 'proposer commitments', 'preconfirmations').

last_reviewed.description: Last review date for this schema artefact (YYYY-MM-DD).

sources_md.description: Optional pointer to a curated sources file (Markdown).

references.description: Primary-source references (URIs). Keep minimal here if sources.md is used.

notes.description: Optional short notes for ambiguity, naming collisions, or interpretation caveats.
